title: brand-bot-logo-blue
attribution: Bank of Thailand / official website bot.or.th, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: Bank of Thailand primary wordmark. Blue circular Phra Siam Deva Dhiracha deity emblem left, Thai script and 'BANK OF THAILAND' text right. Official blue-on-white lockup from bot.or.th logo history page. Primary brand color: deep navy #103050.

title: brand-bot-logo-white
attribution: Bank of Thailand / official website bot.or.th, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: Bank of Thailand white/reversed variant. Same Phra Siam Deva Dhiracha emblem and wordmark in white on dark background. Reverse lockup from official site. Companion to the blue version.

title: brand-bot-building-brandworld
attribution: Bank of Thailand / official website bot.or.th, reference-only
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED brand-world (not logo): BOT headquarters building exterior with BOT emblem visible on facade. Neutral grey-steel architecture. og:image from official site. Useful as brand-world reference showing institutional register.
brandCoverageItem: Bank of Thailand (BOT) — brand-world / building exterior

title: brand-bot-economics-photo
attribution: Bank of Thailand / official website bot.or.th
inspectionNote: REJECTED: Generic stock-style finance photo showing hands on calculator and laptop. Not a brand mark or brand-world asset. Auto-discovered from page, unrelated to brand coverage purpose.

title: brand-cp-group-logo
attribution: Charoen Pokphand Group (CP Group) / Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: CP Group / Charoen Pokphand Group logo. Thai script 'เครือเจริญโภคภัณฑ์' below the distinctive green rounded-square emblem with lotus/trident motif. Solid green (#10B050) on white. This is the Thai-market version of the CP Group corporate mark. Provenance: Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo.
brandCoverageItem: ACM Holding / CP Group (Charoen Pokphand) — corporate logo

title: brand-cp-group-logo-secondary
attribution: Charoen Pokphand Group (CP Group) / Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo
inspectionNote: DUPLICATE: Same CP Group logo at lower resolution. Duplicate of brand-cp-group-logo-open-graph-image. Not needed as primary.

title: brand-ais-logo
attribution: Advanced Info Service PCL (AIS) / Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: AIS (Advanced Info Service) logo. Green gradient swoosh/wave motif (two overlapping leaf/wing shapes) left, bold 'AIS' wordmark right in near-black. Primary brand green is a yellow-green ~#90D010 to lime gradient. Clean horizontal lockup on white. Provenance: Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo.

title: brand-kakaobank-logo
attribution: KakaoBank Corp / Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: KakaoBank Corp logo. Bright yellow rounded-rectangle icon containing bold dark 'B' letterform (with vertical line inside) left; 'kakaobank' lowercase wordmark in near-black right. Brand primary yellow ~#F0F010 (vivid Kakao yellow). Horizontal lockup on white. Provenance: Wikimedia Commons PD-Textlogo.

title: brand-ktb-logo
attribution: Krungthai Bank PCL / Wikipedia, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: Krungthai Bank (KTB) symbol. White Vayupaksa mythical bird silhouette on sky-blue circular background. This is the symbol/emblem only (no wordmark text). Brand primary blue ~#10B0F0. Circular badge format. Provenance: Wikipedia infobox image from official SVG on Wikimedia EN.

title: brand-ktb-logo-small-official
attribution: Krungthai Bank PCL / krungthai.com official site, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED but low-res: Official krungthai.com site header logo. Very small (168x65) and appears mostly white/grey - likely a white-on-transparent or white-on-very-light-background wordmark variant, too small to confirm details. Companion to the Wikipedia bird emblem. Accepted as official site provenance confirmation.
brandCoverageItem: Krungthai Bank (KTB) — official site header logo (low-res companion)

title: brand-ptt-or-logo
attribution: PTT Oil and Retail Business PCL / pttor.com official site, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: PTT OR (PTT Oil and Retail Business) logo. Left element: stylised blue teardrop/flame with red circle at base (the PTT flame mark). Right element: bold 'OR' text in deep navy blue with light blue swoosh/arc below. Brand primaries: navy #101070, light blue #10B0F0, red accent #F01030. Downloaded from official pttor.com.
brandCoverageItem: PTT OR (PTT Oil and Retail Business) — logo

title: brand-truemoney-logo
attribution: TrueMoney / Ascend Money Group / Wikimedia Commons CC BY 4.0, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: TrueMoney wordmark. 'true' in bold red (#F01030) lowercase + 'money' in orange (#F09030) lowercase on transparent/white. Two-color horizontal wordmark. File on checkered background (PNG transparency). Primary brand colors: red #F01030, orange #F09030. Provenance: Wikimedia Commons CC BY 4.0.
brandCoverageItem: TrueMoney / Ascend Money (consumer brand behind ACM) — logo

title: brand-ascend-money-logo
attribution: Ascend Money Group / ascendcorp.com official Ascend Corp site, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: Ascend Money corporate wordmark. 'ascend' in bold red, 'money' in medium grey. Small but clear horizontal wordmark. Downloaded from Ascend Corp official portfolio page. Primary red ~#F03010, secondary grey ~#909090. Distinct from TrueMoney consumer brand - this is the B2B/corporate identity.
brandCoverageItem: Ascend Money (ACM corporate entity) — corporate wordmark

title: brand-ant-group-logo
attribution: Ant Group / Ant International / Wikipedia infobox, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED: Ant Group logo. Left: stylised ant/bug icon rendered in blue gradient tones with circular body and antenna-like antennae. Right: 'ANT GROUP' wordmark in bold near-black. Primary brand blue ~#1090F0 (sky to royal blue gradient). Provenance: Wikipedia infobox, sourced from Wikimedia EN.
brandCoverageItem: Ant Group / Ant International — partner logo

title: brand-scbx-logo
attribution: SCB X PCL / investor.scbx.com official investor relations site, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED by Read visual inspection: SCB X clean typographic wordmark. 'SCB' in large bold near-black sans-serif, superscript lowercase 'x' upper-right. Minimalist all-text identity, no symbol. Brand is near-black/charcoal (~#303030) on white. Downloaded from official SCB X investor relations site. WebP format failed PS analyzer but visually inspected.

title: brand-scbx-logo-white
attribution: SCB X PCL / scbx.com official site, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED by Read visual inspection: SCB X white/light-grey variant of the same typographic wordmark. Same 'SCB^x' layout in light grey/white. This is the reversed/white version of the mark. Downloaded from official scbx.com. WebP format failed PS analyzer.
brandCoverageItem: SCB X PCL — white/reversed logo variant

title: brand-wetechnology-webank-logo
attribution: WeBank Co. Ltd (parent of WeTechnology Limited) / Wikipedia PD-textlogo, reference-only, trademark
inspectionNote: CONFIRMED with caveat: This is WeBank (微众银行 - Chinese Tencent-backed neobank) logo, not WeTechnology Limited's own mark. WeTechnology Limited (the Thai consortium entity) has no discoverable public logo. 'WeBank' in red italic + '微众银行' (Chinese characters) in navy blue. Used as closest available proxy for WeTechnology's parent brand identity. Clearly labeled as proxy. Primary colors: navy #105090, red #D01010.
brandCoverageItem: WeTechnology Limited / WeBank (proxy — WeTechnology has no public logo; WeBank is parent entity)

title: brand-scbx-logo-jpg
attribution: SCB X PCL / scbx.com official site, reference-only, trademark
